Blood pressure self-check and log (3–4 mornings per week)
Monthly primary care or nurse visit for hypertension monitoring (as needed during med changes)

Small-business pop-up table at a local makers market in Northeast Minneapolis (two Saturdays from now)

schedule.daily_routine: Up at ~6:15am, checks blood pressure, quick breakfast, city workday with a mid-day walk when possible; evenings split between household time and 2–3 hours of business tasks (client emails, invoicing, design work). Weekends are for prep, admin, and occasional markets—often leading to sleep debt.

professional.company: City of Minneapolis – Community Planning & Economic Development (CPED) department
projects: GIS-based housing and zoning analysis for a comprehensive plan update
Reviewing site plan applications and summarizing for planning commission packets
Equity impact metrics for transit-oriented development corridors
Coordinating data requests for a developer incentives audit
professional.performance_issues: Occasional late responses and reduced availability for ad-hoc requests during peak business weeks; has quietly shifted some nonessential tasks to early mornings to avoid drawing attention, worried it could affect promotion prospects.
workplace_relationships: Direct supervisor: Nina Patel (supportive but expects quick turnaround on council requests)

Administrative coordinator: Sheila Morgan (gatekeeper for schedules; Felix tries to keep medical appointments vague)

Attending local lectures on housing policy and design
habits: Uses CPAP nightly (embarrassed to discuss outside close relationships)
Tracks blood pressure and sleep metrics in an app
Late-night screen time while doing business admin (hurts sleep quality)
Limits caffeine after 2pm but occasionally relies on coffee during deadline weeks
Avoids heavy drinking due to blood pressure and sleep apnea (rare social drinks)
lifestyle.living_situation: Rents a two-bedroom apartment in the Longfellow area with his partner; second bedroom doubles as a home office and storage for small-business inventory and shipping supplies.
lifestyle.dietary_preferences: Generally heart-conscious (lower sodium, more vegetables, lean proteins) but meal timing is inconsistent during busy weeks; tries to meal-prep on Sundays to avoid takeout.
